ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gps_data" (
  "gps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPS data point */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle from which the data was collected */,
  "utc_timestamp" TEXT /* UTC timestamp of the GPS data point */,
  "utc_milliseconds" TEXT /* UTC milliseconds of the GPS data point */,
  "pc_local_time" TEXT /* Local PC time of the GPS data point */,
  "pc_time" TEXT /* PC time of the GPS data point */,
  "channel_bitmap" TEXT /* Channel bitmap for data integrity and synchronization */,
  "sequence_bitmap" TEXT /* Sequence bitmap for data integrity and synchronization */,
  "gps_date" TEXT /* Date of the GPS data point */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the vehicle's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the vehicle's location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the vehicle's location */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the GPS signal */,
  "speed" TEXT /* Speed of the vehicle */,
  "speed_type" INTEGER /* Type of speed measurement (e.g., km/h, mph) */,
  "true_heading" TEXT /* True heading of the vehicle */,
  "magnetic_heading" TEXT /* Magnetic heading of the vehicle */,
  "magnetic_variation" TEXT /* Magnetic variation at the vehicle's location */,
  "gps_error" INTEGER /* GPS error information */,
  "data_status" INTEGER /* Data status (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the GPS device */,
  "odometer" REAL /* Odometer reading at the time of the GPS data point */,
  "engine_status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle's engine (e.g., running, off) */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the GPS data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gps_data_speed_type FOREIGN KEY ("speed_type") REFERENCES speed_types ("speed_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gps_data_data_status FOREIGN KEY ("data_status") REFERENCES data_statuses ("data_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gps_data_gps_error FOREIGN KEY ("gps_error") REFERENCES gps_errors ("gps_error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gps_data_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_registration" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Cargo capacity of the vehicle */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company name of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speed_types" (
  "speed_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speed type */,
  "speed_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the speed type (e.g., km/h, mph) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the speed type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speed_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_statuses" (
  "data_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data status */,
  "data_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the data status (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gps_errors" (
  "gps_error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPS error */,
  "gps_error_name" TEXT /* Name of the GPS error (e.g., no signal, incorrect coordinates) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the GPS error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gps_error_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fleet manager, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "gps_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GPS data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the GPS data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the GPS data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_gps_id FOREIGN KEY ("gps_id") REFERENCES gps_data ("gps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
